notes: v0.2.9: Effects DSP tuning. Compressor adds +6 dB makeup gain by default (compression is now actually audible). Distortion rewritten with asymmetric soft clip (no gain compensation, drive 10, mix 70%) — actually sounds distorted now. Chorus is now 3-voice (rich, no more single-voice whirlpool). Flanger defaults tamed. Delay feedback capped at 0.8 max (no more infinite loops). EQ and reverb unchanged.
